These are the files on this disk:                       June 18, 2000

TUME2667.ZIP    tUME version v00.2667 executables. PKUNZIP into \TUME
DEMOMAPS.ZIP    Example maps for tUME. PKUNZIP into \TUME\EXAMPLES
README.TXT      Quick guided tour of tUME features
DUMPTUME.ZIP    Source for DUMPTUME. use -d with PKUNZIP into \DUMPTUME
TPBIN.ZIP       Source for TPBIN. use -d with PKUNZIP into \TPBIN
TPMCKID2.ZIP    Source for TPMCKID2. use -d with PKUNZIP into \TPMCKID2
TUMETOOL.ZIP    Various support tools for tUME
PACKLIST.TXT    This text file

To build DUMPTUME.EXE, TPBIN.EXE and TPMCKID2.EXE, you need Borland C++ 3.1.

To build DUMPTUME.EXE, type:

     md \DUMPTUME
     PKUNZIP -d DUMPTUME.ZIP \DUMPTUME
     make

To build TPBIN.EXE, you must unzip DUMPTUME first, then TPBIN:

     md \TPBIN
     PKUNZIP -d DUMPTUME.ZIP \TPBIN
     PKUNZIP -d TPBIN.ZIP \TPBIN
     make

To build TPMCKID2.EXE, you must unzip DUMPTUME first, then TPMCKID2:

     md \TPMCKID2
     PKUNZIP -d DUMPTUME.ZIP \TPMCKID2
     PKUNZIP -d TPMCKID2.ZIP \TPMCKID2
     make

TUME2667.ZIP:
     TUME     EXE
     TUME     INI
     TUME     FPF
     TUME     ICO
     TUME     PIF

     SIMPLE   LBM

     COLLIDE  LBM
     OBJECTS  LBM
     BRUSHES  LBM
     3LAYER   MAP
     CONVERT  MAP
     COMPOSIT MAP
     GRASS    LBM
     MOUNTAIN LBM
     GLOBALS  LBM
     MEAD_1   MAP
     DEMO     SCR
     DEMOTUME BAT

     echidna/BBYTEMAP H

     graphics/GFX      H

     MTABLE   C  
     PRNTERR  C  
     VERSION  C  
     TPBIN    C  
     PRNTERR  H  
     SWITCHES H  
     README      
     LINKFILE LNK
     LIBS     LNK
     MAKEFILE MAK
     TPBIN    DOC
     echidna/DATAFILE H
     echidna/VERSION  H
     echidna/STRINGS  H

     TPMCKID2 DOC
     echidna/DATAFILE H
     echidna/VERSION  H
